name: Hot Tuna & Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to package directions.
2. Cook the broccoli according to package directions.
3. In a bowl, combine mayonnaise, lemon juice, mustard, soy sauce, ginger, and basil.
4. Toss the cooked pasta, tuna salad, thawed broccoli, and sliced carrots with the dressing until well mixed.
5. Mix gently and serve warm.
